name: /operator-extension-init rejects an unknown source-namespace argument with an actionable error
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-extension-init.sh" no-such-namespace any-file --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'unknown_source_namespace' err.txt && grep -q 'no-such-namespace' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
